name: Bean'n Rice Skillet
recipeIngredient: 1 can black beans (15 oz.), rinsed and drained
1 pound ground beef (optional), browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sauce ingredients in a large skillet.
2. Mix well.
3. Bring to a boil.
4. Stir in all remaining ingredients.
5. Reduce heat to low.
6. Cover and simmer for about 10 minutes or until the rice is cooked and vegetables are tender.
